# Pull Request Report

## 📝 Summary of Changes

_Provide a brief overview of what you did and why._

## 🎯 Related Issue

- Fixes # (issue number)

## 🛠️ Technical Implementation Details

- [ ] Added new module for...
- [ ] Refactored the function...
- [ ] Updated documentation in...

## ✅ Supervisor Checklist

- [ ] **Code Quality:** Does the Super-Linter show a green checkmark?
- [ ] **File Size:** Are all files under the 5MB limit?
- [ ] **Testing:** Have you verified the code runs locally?
- [ ] **Comments:** Is the new code documented/commented?

## 📸 Screenshots/Logs (if applicable)

_Paste output or screenshots here._
